title: SmartHUDReheated
description: Adds an additional hotbar to show helpful items in your inventory
body:
this mod adds an extra bar alongside the hotbar that shows items from your inventory such as a compass or a clock

since 3.2.0 [this config](https://github.com/DeflatedPickle/SmartHUDReheated/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/smarthud/config/smarthud.kts) can be found in your config file. hopefully it's self-explanatory :)

![image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/753297092117790892/927429468866351174/2022-01-03_05.07.52.png)
